de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class AbstractExecutionValue

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionValue
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionValue
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecutionValue, ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionValue

    public abstract class AbstractExecutionValue
extends AbstractExecutionElement
implements IExecutionValue
    Provides a basic implementation of IExecutionValue.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Term condition
      The condition under which the variable has this value.
      private IExecutionConstraint[] constraints
      The IExecutionConstraints.

      The value.

      The parent IExecutionVariable which provides this IExecutionValue.

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected Set<Term> collectRelevantTerms(Services services, Term term)
      Collects all Terms contained in relevant constraints.
      protected boolean containsTerm(Term term, Set<Term> toSearch)
      Checks if the given Term contains at least one of the given once.
      protected void fillRelevantTerms(Services services, Term term, Set<Term> toFill)
      Utility method used by collectRelevantTerms(Services, Term).
      Term getCondition()
      Returns the condition under which the variable (IExecutionValue.getVariable()) has this value.
      IExecutionConstraint[] getConstraints()
      Returns all available IExecutionConstraints.
      String getElementType()
      Returns a human readable element type name.
      PosInOccurrence getModalityPIO()
      Returns the PosInOccurrence of the modality of interest including updates.
      protected abstract IExecutionConstraint[] getNodeConstraints()
      Returns all available IExecutionConstraints of the IExecutionNode on which this IExecutionValue is part of.
      Term getValue()
      Returns the value of the variable.
      IExecutionVariable getVariable()
      Returns the parent IExecutionVariable.
      boolean isValueAnObject()
      Checks if the value represents an object or an attribute of the object defined by the parent IExecutionValue.
      protected IExecutionConstraint[] lazyComputeConstraints()
      Computes the related constraints lazily when getConstraints() is called the first time.
      protected String lazyComputeName()
      Computes the name of this node lazily when AbstractExecutionElement.getName() is called the first time.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractExecutionValue

        public AbstractExecutionValue(ITreeSettings settings,
                              Node proofNode,
                              IExecutionVariable variable,
                              Term condition,
                              Term value)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        settings - The ITreeSettings to use.
        proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
        variable - The parent IExecutionVariable which contains this value.
        condition - The condition.
        value - The value.

    • Method Detail

      • getConstraints

        public IExecutionConstraint[] getConstraints()
                                      throws ProofInputException
        Returns all available IExecutionConstraints.
        Specified by:
        getConstraints in interface IExecutionValue
        Returns:
        The available IExecutionConstraints.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • lazyComputeConstraints

        protected IExecutionConstraint[] lazyComputeConstraints()
                                                 throws ProofInputException
        Computes the related constraints lazily when getConstraints() is called the first time.
        Returns:
        The related IExecutionConstraints.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception

      • getNodeConstraints

        protected abstract IExecutionConstraint[] getNodeConstraints()
        Returns all available IExecutionConstraints of the IExecutionNode on which this IExecutionValue is part of.
        Returns:
        All available IExecutionConstraints.

      • collectRelevantTerms

        protected Set<Term> collectRelevantTerms(Services services,
                                         Term term)
        Collects all Terms contained in relevant constraints.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        term - The initial Term.
        Returns:
        The relevant Terms.

      • fillRelevantTerms

        protected void fillRelevantTerms(Services services,
                                 Term term,
                                 Set<Term> toFill)
        Utility method used by collectRelevantTerms(Services, Term).
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        term - The initial Term.
        toFill - The Set of relevant Terms to fill.

      • containsTerm

        protected boolean containsTerm(Term term,
                               Set<Term> toSearch)
        Checks if the given Term contains at least one of the given once.
        Parameters:
        term - The Term to search in.
        toSearch - The Terms to search.
        Returns:
        true at least one Term is contained, false none of the Terms is contained.

        public IExecutionVariable getVariable()
        Returns the parent IExecutionVariable.
        Specified by:

        Returns:
        The parent IExecutionVariable.

      • lazyComputeName

        protected String lazyComputeName()
                          throws ProofInputException
        Computes the name of this node lazily when AbstractExecutionElement.getName() is called the first time.
        Specified by:
        lazyComputeName in class AbstractExecutionElement
        Returns:
        The human readable name of this IExecutionNode.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • getValue

        public Term getValue()

        Returns the value of the variable.
        Specified by:
        getValue in interface IExecutionValue
        Returns:
        The value of the variable.
        Throws:

      • isValueAnObject

        public boolean isValueAnObject()
                        throws ProofInputException

        Checks if the value represents an object or an attribute of the object defined by the parent IExecutionValue.

        All values which are not a basic datatype (integer, boolean, ...) and not an instance of a library class will be treated as object.

        Specified by:
        isValueAnObject in interface IExecutionValue
        Returns:
        true is an object, false is an attribute of the object defined by the parent IExecutionValue.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
